Container.Name: Slopsmith
Container.Overview:
A self-contained web application for browsing, playing, and practicing Rocksmith 2014 Custom DLC (CDLC). Runs entirely in Docker.
DISCLAIMER: This is an unofficial, community-provided Docker image. The application is not actively maintained and may break at any time during major project architecture shifts.
Container.Description: A self-contained web application for browsing, playing, and practicing Rocksmith 2014 Custom DLC (CDLC). Runs entirely in Docker — no local dependencies required.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port for Slopsmith Web UI

Config.Name: DLC Directory
Config.Description: Where your Rocksmith 2014 CDLC is stored.

Config.Name: Appdata Directory
Config.Description: Location for config DB and cache.

Config.Name: Plugin - Install List
Config.Description: Comma separated list of git URLs to install. E.g. https://github.com/byrongamatos/slopsmith-plugin-ug.git, https://github.com/byrongamatos/slopsmith-plugin-tones.git

Config.Name: Plugin - Disable List
Config.Description: Comma separated list of plugin folder names to remove/disable. E.g. slopsmith-plugin-ug, slopsmith-plugin-tones

Config.Name: Plugin - Auto Update
Config.Description: Automatically `git pull` plugins to update them on container start.

Config.Name: DLC_DIR Env
Config.Description: Internal application environment variable for DLC dir

Config.Name: CONFIG_DIR Env
Config.Description: Internal application environment variable for appdata config
